'''molangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:elastocaloric|elastocaloric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elastocaloric|elastocaloric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| molangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:molangithi|molangithi]] || [[word:molangiji|molangiji]] || [[word:molangishi|molangishi]] || [[word:molangiki|molangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:molanguthuthu|molanguthuthu]] || [[word:molangujuju|molangujuju]] || [[word:molangushushu|molangushushu]] || [[word:molangukuku|molangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:molanguthu|molanguthu]] || [[word:molanguju|molanguju]] || [[word:molangushu|molangushu]] || [[word:molanguku|molanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:molangufthuf|molangufthuf]] || [[word:molangufjuf|molangufjuf]] || [[word:molangufshuf|molangufshuf]] || [[word:molangufkuf|molangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:molangethe|molangethe]] || [[word:molangeje|molangeje]] || [[word:molangeshe|molangeshe]] || [[word:molangeke|molangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:molangothotho|molangothotho]] || [[word:molangojojo|molangojojo]] || [[word:molangoshosho|molangoshosho]] || [[word:molangokoko|molangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:molangotho|molangotho]] || [[word:molangojo|molangojo]] || [[word:molangosho|molangosho]] || [[word:molangoko|molangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:molangofthof|molangofthof]] || [[word:molangofjof|molangofjof]] || [[word:molangofshof|molangofshof]] || [[word:molangofkof|molangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:molangĂŻfthĂŻf|molangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfjĂŻf|molangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfshĂŻf|molangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfkĂŻf|molangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:molangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|molangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|molangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|molangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|molangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:molangĂŻfthĂŻf|molangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfjĂŻf|molangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfshĂŻf|molangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfkĂŻf|molangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:molangĂŻfthĂŻf|molangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfjĂŻf|molangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfshĂŻf|molangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:molangĂŻfkĂŻf|molangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:molangĂŠthĂŠ|molangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:molangĂŠjĂŠ|molangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:molangĂŠshĂŠ|molangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:molangĂŠkĂŠ|molangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:molangathatha|molangathatha]] || [[word:molangajaja|molangajaja]] || [[word:molangashasha|molangashasha]] || [[word:molangakaka|molangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:molangatha|molangatha]] || [[word:molangaja|molangaja]] || [[word:molangasha|molangasha]] || [[word:molangaka|molangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:molangafthaf|molangafthaf]] || [[word:molangafjaf|molangafjaf]] || [[word:molangafshaf|molangafshaf]] || [[word:molangafkaf|molangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:molangasha|molangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:molangshĂ«asha|molangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molangroasha|molangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molangmuasha|molangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:molangyaasha|molangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolangnkshĂ«asha|gomolangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolangnkroasha|gomolangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolangnkmuasha|gomolangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolangnkyaasha|gomolangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:molalangasha|molalangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:molalangshĂ«asha|molalangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molalangroasha|molalangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molalangmuasha|molalangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:molalangyaasha|molalangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolalangnkshĂ«asha|gomolalangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolalangnkroasha|gomolalangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolalangnkmuasha|gomolalangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolalangnkyaasha|gomolalangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:melĂŠngasha|melĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:melĂŠngshĂ«asha|melĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:melĂŠngroasha|melĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:melĂŠngmuasha|melĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:melĂŠngyaasha|melĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomelĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gomelĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomelĂŠngnkroasha|gomelĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomelĂŠngnkmuasha|gomelĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomelĂŠngnkyaasha|gomelĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:molfangasha|molfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:molfangshĂ«asha|molfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molfangroasha|molfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molfangmuasha|molfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:molfangyaasha|molfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolfangnkshĂ«asha|gomolfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolfangnkroasha|gomolfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolfangnkmuasha|gomolfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolfangnkyaasha|gomolfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
